terminal: TradingView Desktop 3.3.0 via tradingview-mcp CLI (CDP 9222), 60 daily bars per symbol saved to ta-work/ohlcv-*.json
barState: US equity symbols show the completed 2026-07-16 daily bar (2026-07-17 session not yet open at capture). TVC:UKOIL includes the live 2026-07-17 bar. All levels below are from completed bars unless marked live.

TVC:UKOIL.notes: 87.55 = the strike-week spike high, untouched since; 83.31 = the pre-escalation Friday close now acting as the shelf. Holding 83.7-85.5 on deadline day.

AMEX:XLE.notes: Closed 57.02, first close above the old 56.50 ceiling; 57.30 tagged and rejected intraday twice this week - breakout confirms only on a daily close above 57.30.

NYSE:TSM.notes: Record Q2 print, stock still closed -2.3% (was down >4% early per news framing; the close is the chart fact). 403.50 = this week's triple-touched low = 20-day low. Close cluster 419.5-421.6 overhead.

NASDAQ:NDX.notes: Closed below the 29502.60 support named in video-04 - that break is now the story. 28814.57 = twice-touched July floor; lose it and the June range below opens.

SP_DLY:SPX.notes: Four highs in nine sessions between 7570 and 7581.50 - a quadruple-tested ceiling. Floor for the week 7504.02. Index held a 77-point band while NDX broke: rotation, not risk-off.

TVC:US10Y.notes: Drifting down from the 4.64 July high; 4.45 = the floor that held twice. Quiet driver - a break of 4.45 changes the rotation math.
